name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-35
title: Stale comments in dispatch-tdd-subagent.py reference deleted --no-human-approval flag
description: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py line 109 help text says: 'Replaces the legacy --no-human-approval flag.' The legacy flag has been removed for many revisions per spec Inv 12 and the test test-human-approval-gate-flag.py asserts removal. The reference is now historical noise that adds nothing. Also test files reference the old legacy_strings in detection lists; these can be reduced to a one-line guard since the flags are long gone.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: superseded — --no-human-approval was renamed to --human-approval-gate in PR #109
